program.name: acr
program.description: A tool to analyze commits and create new ones with AI assistance

analyze.name: analyze
analyze.description: Analyze commits individually or in groups from the local Git repository

create.name: create
create.description: Create a new commit with AI assistance

set_config.name: set_config
set_config.description: Updates configurations in the format KEY=VALUE (e.g., OPENAI_API_KEY=<value>)
set_config.usage_example: Updates configurations in the format KEY=VALUE (e.g., OPENAI_API_KEY=<value>)

messages.prompt: What do you want to do?

commands.analyze: Analyze commits individually or in groups from the local Git repository
commands.create: Create a new commit with AI assistance
commands.set_config: Updates configurations in the format KEY=VALUE (e.g., OPENAI_API_KEY=<value>)
